name: OmopRaceCodes
title: OMOP Race-vocabulary codes (top-level, used in person.race_concept_id)
description: The seven concepts that may legally land in `person.race_concept_id`: five Standard race concepts (Athena vocabulary_id='Race', standard_concept='S') plus the two non-Standard catch-alls (8522 Other Race, 8552 Unknown). The `system` is the OMOP concept URI; the `code` is the Athena concept_id as a string. Athena has 1,409 Race concepts total — the rest are sub-tribal/sub-ethnic detail (e.g. 'Apache', 'Acadia Band') which are valid descendants but not used at the top level since OMOP `person.race_concept_id` is a single column without hierarchical aggregation semantics.

extension.valueString: SELECT concept_id::text AS code, concept_name AS display FROM vocab.concept WHERE vocabulary_id = 'Race' AND concept_id IN (8657, 8515, 8516, 8527, 8557, 8522, 8552)

concept.display: Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander
